```console
$ docker pull phpmyadmin@sha256:f0421ee5ee034f0ef6cab61c8e34e12ca986a690d89d3cfa46bf20089ef65737
```

-	Docker Version: 20.10.23
-	Manifest MIME: `application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json`
-	Total Size: **198.3 MB (198314658 bytes)**  
	(compressed transfer size, not on-disk size)
-	Image ID: `sha256:bf29c83db699107c746b5ed76cebda9ac645c89282ee79815a0202d5f9aa6047`
-	Entrypoint: `["\/docker-entrypoint.sh"]`

```console
$ docker pull phpmyadmin@sha256:f0421ee5ee034f0ef6cab61c8e34e12ca986a690d89d3cfa46bf20089ef65737
```

-	Docker Version: 20.10.23
-	Manifest MIME: `application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json`
-	Total Size: **198.3 MB (198314658 bytes)**  
	(compressed transfer size, not on-disk size)
-	Image ID: `sha256:bf29c83db699107c746b5ed76cebda9ac645c89282ee79815a0202d5f9aa6047`
-	Entrypoint: `["\/docker-entrypoint.sh"]`
